q: How is the merit score calculated?
q_gu: Merit score કેવી રીતે ગણવામાં આવે છે?
a: Merit = (Theory Marks / Theory Total) × 200 + (GUJCET Marks / 120) × 100. For farming background students an additional 5% bonus is added. Maximum merit is 300.
a_gu: Merit = (Theory Marks / Theory Total) × 200 + (GUJCET Marks / 120) × 100. ખેડૂત પૃષ્ઠભૂમિ ધરાવતા વિદ્યાર્થીઓ માટે 5% bonus ઉમેરવામાં આવે છે. મહત્તમ merit 300 છે.

q: What is the difference between Category 1, 2, and 3?
q_gu: Category 1, 2 અને 3 વચ્ચે શો ફરક છે?
a: Category 1 is for B-Group (PCB) students only and covers core agriculture programs (B.Sc. Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Biotechnology). Category 2 is for both A-Group (PCM) and B-Group students and covers technical programs (B.Tech. Agricultural Engineering, Food Technology, Agri IT). Category 3 is for both groups and covers Home & Community Science (B.Sc. Community Science, Dietetics & Nutrition).
a_gu: Category 1 ફક્ત B-Group (PCB) વિદ્યાર્થીઓ માટે છે — B.Sc. Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Biotechnology. Category 2 A-Group (PCM) અને B-Group બંને માટે — B.Tech. Agricultural Engineering, Food Technology, Agri IT. Category 3 બંને group માટે — B.Sc. Community Science, Dietetics & Nutrition.

q: Which documents are required for the application form?
q_gu: Application form માટે કયા documents જરૂરી છે?
a: You need: Class 10 marksheet, Class 12 marksheet, GUJCET scorecard, Category certificate (if applicable), Domicile certificate, Farming certificate (if claiming bonus), Passport-size photograph, and Signature scan.
a_gu: ધો.10 marksheet, ધો.12 marksheet, GUJCET scorecard, Category certificate (જો લાગુ હોય), Domicile certificate, Farming certificate (bonus claim માટે), Passport-size ફોટો, Signature scan.

a: GUJCET (Gujarat Common Entrance Test) is a state-level exam conducted by GSEB for admission to engineering, pharmacy, and agriculture programs in Gujarat. For agriculture admissions it is out of 120 marks (Biology + Chemistry sections).
a_gu: GUJCET (Gujarat Common Entrance Test) GSEB દ્વારા આયોજિત રાજ્ય-સ્તરીય પ્રવેશ પરીક્ષા છે. Agriculture admissions માટે 120 marks (Biology + Chemistry sections) ની પ્રવેશ પરીક્ষા.

q: How many rounds of admission are there?
q_gu: Admission ના કેટલા rounds હોય છે?
a: There are typically 3 main rounds of admission plus a Mop-up round. In each round, colleges are allotted based on merit and your college preferences. You must accept/reject the allotment within the given timeframe.
a_gu: સામાન્ય રીતે 3 main rounds + 1 Mop-up round. દરેક round માં merit અને college preferences ના આધારે college allot થાય છે. Allotment accept/reject ચોક્કસ સમયમર્યાદામાં કરવું પડે છે.

q: What is the farming background bonus?
a: Students whose parents are farmers (holding a farming certificate from the Talati/Mamlatdar office) get a 5% bonus on their calculated merit score. For example, a merit of 240 becomes 252 with the bonus.
a_gu: જે વિદ્યાર્થીઓના parents ખેડૂત છે (Talati/Mamlatdar નું farming certificate હોય) તેઓ calculated merit score પર 5% bonus મળે. ઉદાહરણ: merit 240 હોય, bonus સાથે 252 થઈ જાય.

q: Can I apply for multiple categories?
q_gu: શું હું multiple categories માટે apply કરી શકું?
a: Yes, but you must satisfy the stream eligibility. B-Group students can apply for all 3 categories. A-Group students can only apply for Category 2 and Category 3.
a_gu: હા, પરંતુ stream eligibility પૂરી કરવી જરૂરી. B-Group વિદ્યાર્થીઓ ત્રણેય category માટે apply કરી શકે. A-Group ફક્ત Category 2 અને 3 માટે apply કરી શકે.

q: How do I know which college I am eligible for?
q_gu: હું કઈ college માટે eligible છું તે કેવી રીતે જાણીશ?
a: Use AgriPredict's Merit Calculator. Enter your theory marks, GUJCET score, and reservation category. The calculator will show all colleges ranked by your admission probability based on last year's cutoff data.
a_gu: AgriPredict ના Merit Calculator નો ઉપયોગ કરો. Theory marks, GUJCET score અને reservation category નાખો. Calculator ગયા વર્ષ ના cutoff ના આધારે probability સહિત colleges ની list બતાવશે.
